channel.title: PALO Framework News
channel.description: Latest updates, tools, and insights from the PALO Framework - Principled AI Lifecycle Orchestration for responsible AI governance.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026 PALO Framework. All rights reserved.

item.title: PALO v2.0.1 - Documentation and Roadmap Sync
item.description: Documentation sync release aligning README, roadmap, CHANGELOG, sitemap, RSS feed, mobile store links, and homepage release notes with the current PALO Framework state.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: PALO-AM v2.0 - Agentic Governance Modality
item.description: PALO-AM extends the PALO Framework to AI agents and delegated-action systems, with governance objects for identity, authority, risk, controls, evidence, an Action-Space vs Autonomy Matrix, lifecycle overlay, KPI/KRI registry, and worked enterprise scenarios.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: AI Dev Governance - Controls for AI-Assisted Software Development
item.description: New PALO extension for AI-assisted software delivery, rapid prototyping, vibe coding, and coding assistants. The module introduces functional intent, controlled environments, evidence and assurance layers, decision gates, and KPIs/KRIs.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox Available on iOS and iPadOS
item.description: The P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox companion app is available on the App Store for iPhone and iPad, with Evidence Vault, biometric protection, PDF report generation, and direct access to PALO web modules.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: The Poisoning Boomerang - Data Poisoning Governance Module
item.description: New research module analyzing the data poisoning ecosystem, detection strategies, EU AI Act Article 10 and 15 implications, and PALO lifecycle controls for data integrity governance.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: P.A.L.O. Framework Toolbox Available on Google Play
item.description: The Android companion app brings the PALO Framework Toolbox to mobile devices as an offline, privacy-first pre-screening toolkit for AI governance workflows.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: AuditBench Explorer - Hidden AI Behavior Deep Dive
item.description: AuditBench Explorer provides an interactive deep-dive into 14 hidden AI behaviors, auditing techniques, investigator simulations, and PALO-aligned mitigation strategies.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: 2026 Tech Trends Observatory
item.description: The 2026 Tech Trends Observatory compares major consulting-firm technology outlooks and highlights AI governance gaps through a PALO lens.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: Human Agency Risk Map
item.description: The Human Agency Risk Map tracks 18 activities humans increasingly delegate to AI, with psychological impact analysis and mitigation strategies.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: Risk Tiering Calculator
item.description: The Risk Tiering Calculator helps classify AI use cases into EU AI Act risk tiers and provides documentation guidance for governance teams.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework

item.title: PALO Framework Website Launch
item.description: Initial launch of the PALO Framework website and core toolkit for responsible AI governance.
item.dc:creator: PALO Framework
